message:
fix(core): secret redaction regex bugs + agent correlator consistency

policy.rs:
- DEVICE_CODE pattern: Allow lowercase in device codes ([A-Z0-9-] → [A-Za-z0-9-])
  since real OAuth device codes (Azure, Google) use mixed case
- OAUTH_URL pattern: Widen token value class to handle URL-encoded chars
  ([a-zA-Z0-9._-] → [^\s&;'"]) so %xx-encoded and base64 tokens are fully
  redacted

agent_correlator.rs:
- infer_state_from_rule: Change contains("usage.warning") to ends_with()
  for consistency with all other rule_id checks in the function, preventing
  false matches on rule_ids with "usage.warning" in the middle

21,278 lib tests pass. No regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
